name: Crescent Vegetable Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Brown meat and onion in a pan; drain excess fat.
3. Add salt and pepper to the meat mixture.
4. In a separate skillet, sauté zucchini and green bell pepper with margarine for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add dill weed and salt to the vegetables.
6. Unroll the dough triangles and place them in an ungreased pie pan.
7. Press the dough over the bottom and sides of the pan to form a crust.
8. Spread the meat mixture evenly over the crust.
9. Sprinkle half of the shredded cheese over the meat.
10. Evenly distribute the zucchini mixture on top of the meat.
11. Arrange tomato slices on top of the zucchini.
12. Bake at 375°F for an additional 10 minutes, or until heated through.
13. Allow to cool for about 5 minutes before cutting into wedges.
Serves 6. Per serving: 410 calories, 21g protein, 19g carbohydrate, 28g fat, 770mg sodium, 435mg potassium. Pillsbury Easy & Elegant Recipes, Pillsbury Classics #10, p. 47.
